verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ حمٓ
verses.text: Ḥā Mīm.

verses.quran_arabic: تَنزِيلُ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: The sending down of the Book is from God, the Mighty, the Wise.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely in the heavens and the earth (there are) signs indeed for the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَفِى خَلْقِكُمْ وَمَا يَبُثُّ مِن دَآبَّةٍ ءَايَٰتٌۭ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: And in your creation, and what He scatters of the creatures, (there are) signs for a people who are certain.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱخْتِلَٰفِ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مِن رِّزْقٍۢ فَأَحْيَا بِهِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا وَتَصْرِيفِ ٱلرِّيَٰحِ ءَايَٰتٌۭ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: And (in the) alternation of the night and the day, and what God sends down from the sky of (His) provision, and by means of it gives the earth life after its death, and (in the) changing of the winds, (there are) signs for a people who understand.

verses.quran_arabic: تِلْكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱللَّهِ نَتْلُوهَا عَلَيْكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثٍۭ بَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ وَءَايَٰتِهِۦ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Those are the signs of God. We recite them to you in truth. In what (kind of) proclamation – after God and His signs – will they believe?

verses.quran_arabic: وَيْلٌۭ لِّكُلِّ أَفَّاكٍ أَثِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Woe to every liar (and) sinner!

verses.quran_arabic: يَسْمَعُ ءَايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ثُمَّ يُصِرُّ مُسْتَكْبِرًۭا كَأَن لَّمْ يَسْمَعْهَا ۖ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍۢ
verses.text: He hears the signs of God recited to him, (but) then persists in being arrogant, as if he had not heard them. Give him the news of a painful punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا عَلِمَ مِنْ ءَايَٰتِنَا شَيْـًٔا ٱتَّخَذَهَا هُزُوًا ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ مُّهِينٌۭ
verses.text: When he comes to know any of Our signs, he takes them in mockery. Those – for them (there is) a humiliating punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: مِّن وَرَآئِهِمْ جَهَنَّمُ ۖ وَلَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُم مَّا كَسَبُوا۟ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا مَا ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَوْلِيَآءَ ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: Behind them is Gehenna, and what they have earned will be of no use to them at all, nor those whom they have taken as allies instead of God. For them (there is) a great punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا هُدًۭى ۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ مِّن رِّجْزٍ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: This is guidance, but those who disbelieve in the signs of their Lord – for them (there is) a punishment of painful wrath.

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا هُدٗىۖ وَاَلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٍ
canonical_variants.english: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا هُدٗىۖ وَاَلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مِّن  رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٍ
canonical_variants.english: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا هُدٗىۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٍ
canonical_variants.english: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا هُدٗىۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٌ
canonical_variants.english: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a painful punishment of torment.

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا هُدىٗۖ وَالذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجْزٍ أَلِيمٍۖ
canonical_variants.english: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا هُدىٗۖ وَالذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجْزٍ اَلِيمٍۖ
canonical_variants.english: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلْبَحْرَ لِتَجْرِىَ ٱلْفُلْكُ فِيهِ بِأَمْرِهِۦ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: (It is) God who has subjected the sea to you, so that the ship may run on it by His command, and so that you may seek some of His favor, and that you may be thankful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُم مَّا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًۭا مِّنْهُ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: And He has subjected to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth – all (of it is) from Him. Surely in that are signs indeed for a people who reflect.

verses.quran_arabic: قُل لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَغْفِرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ لَا يَرْجُونَ أَيَّامَ ٱللَّهِ لِيَجْزِىَ قَوْمًۢا بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: Say to those who believe to forgive those who do not expect the days of God, so that He may repay a people for what they have earned.

verses.quran_arabic: مَنْ عَمِلَ صَٰلِحًۭا فَلِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَنْ أَسَآءَ فَعَلَيْهَا ۖ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: Whoever does righteousness, it is for himself, and whoever does evil, it is (likewise) against himself – then to your Lord you will be returned.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَٱلْحُكْمَ وَٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَرَزَقْنَٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلطَّيِّبَٰتِ وَفَضَّلْنَٰهُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Certainly We gave the Sons of Israel the Book, and the judgment, and the prophetic office. We provided them with good things and favored them over the worlds.

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُم بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ ۖ فَمَا ٱخْتَلَفُوٓا۟ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْعِلْمُ بَغْيًۢا بَيْنَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقْضِى بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ فِيمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.text: And We gave them clear signs of the matter. They did not differ until after the knowledge had come to them, (because of) envy among themselves. Surely your Lord will decide between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning their differences.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَٰكَ عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ فَٱتَّبِعْهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَآءَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Then We placed you on a pathway of the matter. So follow it, and do not follow the (vain) desires of those who do not know.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّهُمْ لَن يُغْنُوا۟ عَنكَ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًۭٔا ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ بَعْضُهُمْ أَوْلِيَآءُ بَعْضٍۢ ۖ وَٱللَّهُ وَلِىُّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: Surely they will be of no use to you at all against God. Surely the evildoers are allies of each other, but God is the Ally of the ones who guard (themselves).

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا بَصَٰٓئِرُ لِلنَّاسِ وَهُدًۭى وَرَحْمَةٌۭ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: This is evidence for the people, and a guidance and mercy for a people who are certain.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱجْتَرَحُوا۟ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجْعَلَهُمْ كَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءًۭ مَّحْيَاهُمْ وَمَمَاتُهُمْ ۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: Or do those who commit evil deeds think that We shall treat them as those who believe and do righteous deeds – alike in their life and their death? Evil is what they judge!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ حَسِبَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ اَ۪جۡتَرَحُواْ اُ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمۡ كَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمۡ وَمَمَاتُهُمۡۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ حَسِبَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ اَ۪جۡتَرَحُواْ اُ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمۡ كَاَلَّذِينَ  ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰت سَّوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمۡ وَمَمَاتُهُمۡۚ سَآءَ  مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱجۡتَرَحُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمۡ كَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمۡ وَمَمَاتُهُمۡۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱجۡتَرَحُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمۡ كَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٗ مَّحۡيَاهُمۡ وَمَمَاتُهُمۡۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as equal to those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds, whether in their life or their death? Miserable is their judgment!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱجۡتَرَحُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمُۥ كَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمُۥ وَمَمَاتُهُمُۥۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱجۡتَرَحُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمُۥ كَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمُۥ وَمَمَاتُهُمُۥۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمْ حَسِبَ اَ۬لذِينَ اَ۪جْتَرَحُواْ اُ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجْعَلَهُمْ كَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحْيَاهُمْ وَمَمَاتُهُمْۖ سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمْ حَسِبَ اَ۬لذِينَ اَ۪جْتَرَحُواْ اُ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجْعَلَهُمْ كَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحْي۪اهُمْ وَمَمَاتُهُمْۖ سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!

verses.quran_arabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
verses.text: God created the heavens and the earth in truth, and so that each person may be paid for what he has earned – and they will not be done evil.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَٰهَهُۥ هَوَىٰهُ وَأَضَلَّهُ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍۢ وَخَتَمَ عَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِۦ وَقَلْبِهِۦ وَجَعَلَ عَلَىٰ بَصَرِهِۦ غِشَٰوَةًۭ فَمَن يَهْدِيهِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Have you seen the one who has taken his (vain) desire as his god? God has led him astray on (the basis of) knowledge, and set a seal on his hearing and his heart, and made a covering on his sight. Who will guide him after God? Will you not take heed?

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ مَا هِىَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا يُهْلِكُنَآ إِلَّا ٱلدَّهْرُ ۚ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
verses.text: But they say, ‘There is nothing but our present life. We die, and we live, and nothing destroys us but time.’ They have no knowledge about that. They only conjecture.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا اَ۬لدُّنۡيۭا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَآ إِلَّا اَ۬لدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمۡ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
canonical_variants.english: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا اَ۬لدُّنۡيۭا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَا  إِلَّا اَ۬لدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمۡ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
canonical_variants.english: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنۡيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَآ إِلَّا ٱلدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمۡ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
canonical_variants.english: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنۡيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَآ إِلَّا ٱلدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمۡ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
canonical_variants.english: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنۡيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَا إِلَّا ٱلدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُمُۥ بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمُۥ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
canonical_variants.english: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنۡيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَا إِلَّا ٱلدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُمُۥ بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمُۥ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
canonical_variants.english: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا اَ۬لدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا يُهْلِكُنَا إِلَّا اَ۬لدَّهْرُۖ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۖ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا اَ۬لدُّنْي۪ا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْي۪ا وَمَا يُهْلِكُنَآ إِلَّا اَ۬لدَّهْرُۖ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۖ اِنْ هُمُۥٓ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَٰتُنَا بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ مَّا كَانَ حُجَّتَهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوا۟ ٱئْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: When Our signs are recited to them as clear signs, their only argument is that they say, ‘Bring (back) our fathers, if you are truthful!’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلِ ٱللَّهُ يُحْيِيكُمْ ثُمَّ يُمِيتُكُمْ ثُمَّ يَجْمَعُكُمْ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘God gives you life, then causes you to die, (and) then He gathers you to the Day of Resurrection – (there is) no doubt about it. But most of the people do not know (it).’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِلَّهِ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَيَوْمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَخْسَرُ ٱلْمُبْطِلُونَ
verses.text: To God (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. On the Day when the Hour strikes, on that Day the perpetrators of falsehood will lose.

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَرَىٰ كُلَّ أُمَّةٍۢ جَاثِيَةًۭ ۚ كُلُّ أُمَّةٍۢ تُدْعَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ كِتَٰبِهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: You will see each community kneeling, each community called to its Book: ‘Today you will be repaid for what you have done.

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا كِتَٰبُنَا يَنطِقُ عَلَيْكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا نَسْتَنسِخُ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: This is Our Book – it speaks about you in truth. Surely We have been copying down what you were doing.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ فَيُدْخِلُهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: As for those who have believed and done righteous deeds, their Lord will cause them to enter into His mercy. That is the clear triumph!

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَفَلَمْ تَكُنْ ءَايَٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَٱسْتَكْبَرْتُمْ وَكُنتُمْ قَوْمًۭا مُّجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: But as for those who have disbelieved: ‘Were My signs not recited to you? Yet you became arrogant and were a sinful people.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّۭ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهَا قُلْتُم مَّا نَدْرِى مَا ٱلسَّاعَةُ إِن نَّظُنُّ إِلَّا ظَنًّۭا وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُسْتَيْقِنِينَ
verses.text: And when it was said, “Surely the promise of God is true, and the Hour – (there is) no doubt about it,” you said, “We do not know what the Hour is. We think (it is) only conjecture, and we are not certain.”’

verses.quran_arabic: وَبَدَا لَهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: The evils of what they have done will become apparent to them, and what they were mocking will overwhelm them.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقِيلَ ٱلْيَوْمَ نَنسَىٰكُمْ كَمَا نَسِيتُمْ لِقَآءَ يَوْمِكُمْ هَٰذَا وَمَأْوَىٰكُمُ ٱلنَّارُ وَمَا لَكُم مِّن نَّٰصِرِينَ
verses.text: And it will be said, ‘Today We forget you, as you forgot the meeting of this Day of yours. Your refuge is the Fire, and you have no helpers.

verses.quran_arabic: ذَٰلِكُم بِأَنَّكُمُ ٱتَّخَذْتُمْ ءَايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ هُزُوًۭا وَغَرَّتْكُمُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۚ فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا يُخْرَجُونَ مِنْهَا وَلَا هُمْ يُسْتَعْتَبُونَ
verses.text: That is because you took the signs of God in mockery, and this present life deluded you.’ So today they will not be brought forth from it, nor will they be allowed to make amends.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلْحَمْدُ رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَرَبِّ ٱلْأَرْضِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Praise (be) to God, Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth, Lord of the worlds!

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْكِبْرِيَآءُ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: To Him (belongs) the greatness in the heavens and the earth. He is the Mighty, the Wise.
